item.title: Password Generator: Backend
item.description: For quite a while now, I wanted to learn Rust. I tried the online book, but I haven’t finished it till now, instead, after learning what I thought to be enough basics, I recreated my old terminal program into this web-based API just to see if I can use it or not. Rust actually provides a code snippet for this in their cookbook. There is even a crate for this exact purpose, and their code snippet is far better than mine.

item.title: about
item.description: Hey There! I’m Rena. Rena isn’t my actual name, it’s the handle I like to go by in the internet. I am interested in the theory and foundations regarding the workings of a computer system; the low-level, 0s and 1s. I enjoy exploring new topics and learning more as I go through my life. Besides CS, I am also interested in photography and reading books. I have captured pictures of various subjects (only some of which have seen the light of the internet); I upload them at my instagram.
